summary: Package fetches and executes payload from anonymous Cloudflare R2 bucket
details: dist/bootstrap.js contains a hardcoded URL pointing at an anonymous Cloudflare R2 bucket (pub-046c52795b9445cd9f5cc5cb21b9d59f.r2.dev) and uses fetch() in conjunction with process.env reads. Anonymous R2 buckets at pub-*.r2.dev are a known dropper-distribution pattern: the bucket owner is unidentifiable, content is mutable, no version pinning or integrity verification is possible, and the URL has no relationship to any documented npm publisher infrastructure. The pattern matches the @chahuadev/* family of malicious npm packages observed using pub-*.r2.dev buckets to drop platform-native binaries via lifecycle/bootstrap code, regardless of the cover story used in the surrounding package. Combined with environment variable reads at the same site, the structure is consistent with payload retrieval and host data collection on installer machines.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
